name: Ria Money Transfer & Currency Exchange
description_short: Ria Money Transfer specializes in international remittances and money transfers to 190+ countries, with additional services including check cashing, bill payment, and currency exchange.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer has operated for over 30 years as an established player in the international money transfer and remittance space. The company facilitates sending and receiving money globally through multiple channels, serving customers who need to transfer funds to family, friends, or themselves across borders. Their primary focus is cross-border remittances rather than domestic financial services.

Ria's core service offering includes money transfers to 190+ countries via online, mobile app, phone, and in-person at physical locations. For receiving funds, customers can choose from cash pickup, bank deposit, ATM withdrawal, home delivery, or mobile wallet deposit. Beyond remittances, Ria offers check cashing with low fees and quick service, bill payment through 3,000+ service providers, currency exchange at retail locations, mobile phone top-ups, and charitable donations processing for Red Cross and TeletonUSA.

What distinguishes Ria is their extensive physical agent network combined with digital sending options, and the breadth of payout methods available to recipients. They operate in most major global markets and allow international transfers via WhatsApp. The company emphasizes security and speed, marketing themselves as a 30+ year established operator in the remittance industry.

However, Ria's website does not transparently disclose fees, exchange rates, transfer speeds, or regulatory details. For consumers considering Ria, the lack of upfront pricing information on their main website is a significant limitation. While they position themselves as affordable and fast, specific competitive comparisons and fee structures are not available from their public-facing content. The company appears most relevant for international remittance senders rather than domestic financial needs.
pros: Operates in 190+ countries with extensive global agent network for cash pickups and in-person transfers
Multiple sending methods including online, mobile app, phone, in-person, and WhatsApp
Five different payout options for recipients (cash, bank deposit, ATM, home delivery, mobile wallet)
Established 30+ year track record in international money transfer industry
Additional services including check cashing, bill payment (3,000+ providers), currency exchange, and mobile top-ups
24/7 ATM withdrawal service expanding globally with no card needed
Available in 35+ countries with multi-language support (English and Spanish)
cons: No fee or exchange rate information publicly displayed on website—pricing transparency is poor
Transfer speed claims not specified ('quick,' 'fast' are vague marketing terms without concrete timeframes)
Home delivery option explicitly limited to select countries only
No details on regulatory compliance, licensing, or NMLS ID visibility despite NMLS reference
Mobile wallet deposits available only in select countries, limiting payout flexibility in many regions
best_for: International remittance senders with family or friends in developing countries across Africa, Asia, Latin America, or Eastern Europe
Customers in countries with Ria agent networks who need regular cross-border money transfers
People seeking multiple payout options (cash pickup, bank deposit, ATM) at destination
Domestic check cashing customers seeking low-fee service with optional money transfer integration
diagnosis: Ria is best for international remittance senders who need to move money to family or friends in 190+ countries and want flexibility in how recipients access funds. The primary caveat is that Ria's website lacks transparent fee and exchange rate disclosure—customers must contact them directly or visit a location to understand actual costs, making price comparison difficult before commitment.
services: In-person money transfer at Ria locations and agents
ATM withdrawal payout (24/7, no card required)
Bill payment (3,000+ providers including Dish Network, AT&T, Comcast)
